# Pull Request

## Pull Request Type

<!--
Describe the kind of change in this pull request. If one of the focused
templates below matches the change, use that template instead:

- Content update: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/content.md
- Web change: .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/web.md
- Repository maintenance, GitHub setup, tooling, or agent config:
  .github/PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE/maintenance.md
-->

---

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR is focused on one issue or one small project concern.
- [ ] User-facing copy keeps the voice clear, personal, and not over-marketed.
- [ ] Relevant docs, templates, or agent instructions were updated.
- [ ] No credentials, private URLs, or local-only paths were added.

---

## Description

<!-- What changed, and why is it useful? Keep this short. -->

---

## Linked Issue

<!-- Use `Closes #<issue-number>` when this PR fully resolves the issue. -->

Closes #

---

## Validation

<!-- List checks, commands, screenshots, or review steps. -->
